name: super-ask
description: AI reports progress and collects user feedback within a single request loop

languageModelTools.name: super-ask_feedback
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Call this tool to report progress and get user feedback BEFORE committing changes, completing major steps, or when you need clarification. Pass a markdown summary of what you have done and a specific question. On the FIRST call, provide a short title describing the task and omit chatSessionId. The tool response will include a chatSessionId — you MUST include it in ALL subsequent calls for the same task to maintain conversation continuity.
languageModelTools.userDescription: AI reports progress and collects user feedback

title.description: A short title for this task (e.g. 'Refactor auth module'). Required on first call, optional on subsequent calls.

chatSessionId.description: Session ID returned by a previous super-ask call. Omit on first call; include on all subsequent calls for the same task.

summary.description: Markdown formatted summary of what you have done so far, including key changes, decisions made, and current status.

question.description: A specific question for the user. What do you need them to review, confirm, or decide?
